info.description:
Partners API for NFT marketplace integration.

Authorization header format: partners <token>

**Rate Limits**

A global limit of 25 req/s applies to all endpoints. Individual endpoints may have stricter limits:

| Endpoint | Limit |
|---|---|
| GET /nfts/search | 15 req/s * |
| GET /nfts/owned | 6 req/s |
| GET /collections/floors | 9 req/s |
| GET /collections/backdrops/floors | 2 req/s |
| GET /collections/models/backgrounds/floors | 3 req/s |
| GET /collections/attribute-floors | 5 req/s |
| GET /collections/{id}/metrics | 8 req/s |
| GET /collection-offers/{id}/top | 10 req/s * |
| GET /collection-offers/{id}/all | 10 req/s * |

\* Can be increased on request. Contact support to adjust your rate limit.
info.title: Portals Partners API

post.description: Create an offer to buy NFTs from a specific collection. Funds will be frozen until offer is accepted or cancelled
Cancel your own collection offer and return frozen funds

get.description: Returns list of collections that support collection offers
Returns top active offers for a collection, sorted by amount descending. Rate limit: 10 req/s (can be increased on request).
Returns the highest active offer for a specific collection. Rate limit: 10 req/s (can be increased on request).

post.description: Accept an offer by providing NFT IDs to sell. NFTs must belong to the offer's collection

get.description: Returns floor prices for all unique model attributes across collections. Rate limit: 5 req/s.
get.summary: Get all unique attribute floor prices

get.description: Returns minimum listing prices grouped by backdrop type. Rate limit: 2 req/s.
get.summary: Get floor prices for common backgrounds

get.description: Returns minimum listing prices for each collection. Rate limit: 9 req/s.
get.summary: Get floor prices for all collections

get.description: Returns minimum listing prices for backdrops of specified models. Rate limit: 3 req/s.
get.summary: Get background floor prices for specific models

get.description: Returns all collections with preview images and basic info. No pagination
Returns historical data for a collection including volume and average prices. Rate limit: 8 req/s.

post.description: Generate a unique deposit ID for TON deposits. Use this ID in transaction memo

get.description: Returns recent market actions (buys, sells, listings, etc.) with optional filters
Returns market settings including commission rate, deposit wallet, and current TON/USDT rate

post.description: Attempts to purchase multiple NFTs. Returns detailed results including successful purchases and failed attempts with reasons. Supports partial purchases - if some NFTs are invalid or unaffordable, others will still be purchased.
post.summary: Buy NFTs with partial purchase support

post.description: Put multiple NFTs on sale with individual prices in a single request

parameters.description: Array of NFT IDs with individual prices
parameters.name: request

post.description: Remove multiple NFTs from sale in a single request

parameters.description: Array of NFT IDs to delist
parameters.name: request

get.description: Returns NFTs owned by the authenticated user with optional filters. Rate limit: 6 req/s.
Search NFTs with various filters - by name, price range, and attributes. Rate limit: 15 req/s (can be increased on request).
get.summary: Search NFTs by name with filters

get.description: Returns counts of total, listed, and unlisted NFTs for the authenticated user

post.description: Transfer NFTs (gifts) from the current user to another user by username or telegram ID. Supports anonymous transfer (no notification sent)
Send NFT gifts to user's Telegram account. Returns withdrawal IDs to track status
post.summary: Withdraw multiple gifts to user account

get.description: Check the status of pending or completed gift withdrawals

post.description: Put a single NFT on sale at the specified price
Remove a single NFT from sale

get.description: Returns actions of the authenticated partner user (purchases, sales, listings, etc.). Useful for tracking when gifts are sold.
Returns wallet balance and deposit address for the authenticated user

post.description: Withdraw TON balance to an external wallet address

parameters.description: Withdrawal details including amount and destination address
parameters.name: request

get.description: Check the status of pending or completed TON withdrawals
Checks if a user exists by provided Telegram ID.

models.description: Deprecated parameter do not use it instead of this use attribute_floors field

x-enum-comments.PremarketOrderStatusDraft: order created but not yet listed
x-enum-comments.PremarketOrderStatusListed: order is active and available for purchase
x-enum-comments.PremarketOrderStatusSold: order has been purchased by a buyer
x-enum-comments.PremarketOrderStatusTransferring: gift is being transferred to buyer

x-enum-comments.InvalidNftNotFound: NFT not found in the database
x-enum-comments.InvalidNftNotListed: NFT is not listed for sale

recipient.example: username (use only if you do not have it) or telegram_id

enum: gift could not be sent inside app; recipient not registered; gift returned to sender; commission returned to sender
gift could not be sent inside app; recipient registered; gift returned to recipient; commission returned to recipient
gift is not on relayer; cannot transfer; write to tech support
